generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - our county sheriff's office got a new grant to upgrade their surveillance tech. They say it's just for tracking known criminals, but I know how these things go. Once they have the system in place, they'll start using it for everything. We need to support our law enforcement having the tools they need to keep us safe. #SupportLocalPolice #NationalSecurity
